d:
Passive. When an enemy has been under control effects for [[6]]s, they take [[350%]]<ATK> damage and are afflicted with drowning. Nerion deals [[30%]] more damage to drowning enemies. And both effects last until the end of the battle.
This passive effect takes only [[4]]s to trigger on enemies that deal magic damage.
Active. Nerion empowers himself with the force of the tide for [[12]]s. While this effect lasts, his ATK and ATK SPD are increased by [[22%]] and [[60]] respectively, and his normal attacks gain the Deluge effect: when a normal attack hits, it bounces between drowning enemies, dealing [[220%]]<ATK> extra damage. Each unit can be hit by the bounce up to [[1]] time.
While empowered by the force of the tide, Nerion's ATK increases to [[24%]], and the extra damage dealt by Deluge increases to [[240%]]<ATK>.
While empowered by the force of the tide, Nerion's ATK increases to [[26%]], and the extra damage dealt by Deluge increases to [[260%]]<ATK>.
While empowered by the force of the tide, Nerion's ATK increases to [[28%]], and the extra damage dealt by Deluge increases to [[280%]]<ATK>.
While empowered by the force of the tide, Nerion's ATK increases to [[30%]], and the extra damage dealt by Deluge increases to [[300%]]<ATK>.

After every [[3]] normal attacks, Nerion's next normal attack becomes enhanced. Upon hitting a target, the enhanced normal attack knocks the target back [[1]] tile, deals [[270%]]<ATK> damage, and stuns them for [[2]]s.
Increases damage to [[300%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[330%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[360%]]<ATK>.

Nerion throws his spear at the area with the most enemies. Upon hitting the target tile, the spear deals [[140%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies within [[1]] tile. [[2]]s later, a raging current erupts, knocking all enemies within the same area into the air and dealing [[210%]]<ATK> damage.
Increases the spear's damage dealt upon hitting the target tile to [[160%]]<ATK>; increases the damage dealt by the following current attack to [[240%]]<ATK>.
Increases the spear's damage dealt upon hitting the target tile to [[180%]]<ATK>; increases the damage dealt by the following current attack to [[270%]]<ATK>.
Increases the spear's damage dealt upon hitting the target tile to [[200%]]<ATK>; increases the damage dealt by the following current attack to [[300%]]<ATK>.
Increases ATK SPD by [[21]] during battle.
Increases ATK SPD by [[27]] during battle.
Increases ATK SPD by [[33]] during battle.

When a battle starts, Nerion applies the drowning effect to the [[rearmost]] enemy. Drowning enemies have their ATK and Haste reduced by [[20%]] and [[40]] respectively, and take [[50%]]<ATK> damage every time they have been under control effects for [[0.5]]s.
Drowning enemies take [[60%]]<ATK> damage every [[0.5]]s while they are under control effects.
Whenever Nerion applies the drowning effect, he immediately gains a permanent Tidal Shield equal to [[600%]]<ATK>. The shield takes [[60%]] less damage from magic attacks.
Drowning enemies take [[70%]]<ATK> damage every [[0.5]]s while they are under control effects.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, each normal attack increases ATK SPD by [[2]] and normal attack damage by [[1%]], stacking up to [[10]] times.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 20 ATK SPD, 8 DEF Penetration.

d: When all non-summoned enemies on the battlefield are under the drowning effect, or if a total of [[4]] non-summoned enemies have been affected by it, Nerion immediately gains [[1000]] Energy and becomes permanently empowered by the force of the tide. While permanently empowered, Nerion gains [[30]] extra Penetration if he has more than [[800]] Energy.
